subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the servants of God purely for His sake, and desire from them no recompense in the realm of dominion. God is sufficient as witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر عباد الله خالصا لوجهه و مانرید منهم جزآء فی الملک و کفی بالله شهیدا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
